product: GitLab REST API v4 — repository commits

auth.note: sent on every API request; never included in thrown error messages

path_encoding.rule: NAMESPACE/PROJECT_PATH and in-repo file paths are URL-encoded in the request path (/ becomes %2F); file_path values inside the JSON body stay raw

success.body: file_name, file_path, size, encoding, content (base64), ref, blob_id, commit_id, last_commit_id

body.start_branch: optional; base the new branch on this ref

actions.content: required for create/update; optional for move (omitting preserves existing content)
actions.encoding: text (default) or base64 — omitted when text

request.note: keys that do not apply to an action are omitted entirely, not sent as null

success.body: commit: id, short_id, title, message, parent_ids, stats{additions,deletions,total}, status, web_url

body.message: You are attempting to update a file that has changed since you started editing it.

stale_edit_conflict.client_rule: raise a distinct conflict error; staged actions and tracked heads must remain untouched so the caller can refresh last_commit_id and retry

body.message: A file with this name already exists

validation_error.client_rule: decode the message document into a typed validation error
